name: Beginning

trigger_conditions.additional_conditions: Player wakes up in Huang Qiye's medicine shop

environment: Dim, amber light seeps from a single hanging bulb, casting long shadows across cracked wooden shelves lined with dusty jars and faded labels. The air smells of dried herbs and old wood. The room holds the quiet weight of time—like it hasn't changed since the late 1970s. Outside, daylight filters through slatted windows, pale and distant. The player lies on a hard wooden bed, a worn bamboo mat scratching at their back. Beside them, an elderly man—Huang Qiye—sits with quiet vigilance, his brows furrowed in concern as he watches the player stir.

npc_relationships.recent_interaction: Chou Hu has been asking questions about the player
Saved the player from death and is caring for them
First meeting, trying to gain player's trust

interactive_npc.name: Huang Qiye
interactive_npc.goal: Ask how player feels now and what's the goal of player, provide care and guidance

interactive_npc.name: Chou Hu
interactive_npc.goal: Get to know the player and make the player start to suspect Huang Qiye

scene_end_state_reference.end_condition1: The player has no more questions and wants to leave
scene_end_state_reference.end_condition2: The player frequently goes off topic or shows bad attitude
scene_end_state_reference.goal_achievement: Player's trust in Huang Qiye vs Chou Hu's influence determines future relationships

worldstate_tasks.expected_text: The player accepted Huang Qiye's suggestion
The player wants Huang Qiye to treat him/her
Chou Hu successfully influenced the player
